decisions.title: Concept feasibility verdict
decisions.decision: Conditionally feasible with native input bridge; not feasible as pure browser dual-foot trackpad game on Windows.
unresolvedQuestions: Per-device dual-contact stability on this Synaptics unit (needs P0)
Whether Win11 GetPointerFrameTouchpadInfo streams free dual-plant vs pan/zoom-only gestures on this machine

decisions.title: Runtime architecture
decisions.decision: Native Win32 or Rust host + WebView2 + touchpad bridge emitting ContactFrame into TypeScript Three.js/Rapier game. Bridge prefers Win11 RegisterTouchpadCapableWindow + GetPointerFrameTouchpadInfo; falls back to Raw Input HID PTP parse.
alternatives: Standalone localhost input bridge + browser tab (probe only)
unresolvedQuestions: Host language preference C# vs Rust vs C++

decisions.title: Native input API preference
decisions.decision: P0-A first on Windows 11: RegisterTouchpadCapableWindow + GetPointerFrameTouchpadInfo / GetPointerTouchpadInfo (POINTER_TOUCH_INFO himetric device coords; Win11-only; Learn docs carry pre-released product disclaimer). P0-B / production fallback: Raw Input + HID preparsed data for Touch Pad TLC 0x0D/0x05 for continuous dual-foot and full PTP button/scan fields when pointer path is gesture-bound or incomplete. Do not use touchpad pixel location fields for feet (they freeze at gesture-start cursor).
alternatives: Raw Input only (skip Win11 pointer APIs)
unresolvedQuestions: Whether Win11 WM_POINTER after RegisterTouchpadCapableWindow streams free dual-plant or only pan/zoom-classified two-finger gestures
Availability of exports on this machine's User32 build (pre-release disclaimer)
Click/button co-delivery quality on pointer path vs HID Button 1

decisions.title: Default camera and input relativity
decisions.decision: Default low three-quarter chase camera; board-relative input mapping after stance calibration; screen-relative only for UI.
unresolvedQuestions: Optimal look-ahead time constants after playtests

decisions.title: Hand and stance mapping
decisions.decision: Calibrate pad-left/pad-right by plant X; bind to nose/tail via regular/goofy; index/middle natural placement; click is global not per-foot.
alternatives: Assume screen axes equal board axes

decisions.title: Control grammar vs continuous forces
decisions.decision: Continuous ContactFrame forces for ground locomotion and modulation; click-centered rule FSM for trick initiation; scoring may name outcomes. Refines README pure continuous wording without changing product vision.
unresolvedQuestions: Exact window lengths per device latency

decisions.title: Physics and assistance model
decisions.decision: Hybrid assisted physics on Rapier3d-deterministic: gesture sets impulses/torque targets; collisions and fails remain physical; assist levels 0-2; soft grind snap default.

decisions.title: Initial trick vocabulary
decisions.decision: Ship order: push, steer, ollie, nollie, kickflip, heelflip, shuv 180, catch/land, one grind type.
unresolvedQuestions: Whether body varials are v0 or v1

decisions.title: Agent and observability contract
decisions.decision: Single ContactFrame pipeline for human, replay, agent; no privileged board movement API; golden traces and synthetic generators required before production.

decisions.title: Asset and license policy
decisions.decision: Prototype with CC0 only (Kenney, Poly Haven); track licenses in catalog; KTX2+meshopt pipeline; MIT/Apache stack preference.
alternatives: CC-BY with credits from day one

decisions.title: Pre-production gates
decisions.decision: G1 input, G2 feel, G3 latency, G4 determinism required before production content; G5 performance and G6 agent before content lock.
alternatives: Build park in parallel with unproven input

decisions.title: Root README preservation
decisions.decision: Preserve root README product direction. Research confirms Three.js/Rapier/ContactFrame/native bridge. Grammar hybrid refinement recorded without gutting vision.
alternatives: Rewrite README to pure gesture catalog game
Rewrite README to pure physics sim
